name: Fithragaer
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) male wearing an almost complete set of steel armor - everything except helmet and shield. Carries a red velvet blouse and garment as spare clothing. Wields a steel war axe.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: battlemage, survivor, guild member, traumatized, lone survivor
Role: Fithragaer is a battlemage and Associate of the Mages Guild. He is the sole survivor of a detachment of battlemages that was sent to the Ayleid Ruin of Nenyond Twyll to search for Mucianus Allias. He knows battlemage spells from all magical schools except Illusion and relies on both his steel war axe and magic in combat.
Home Location Information: Nenyond Twyll, an Ayleid Ruin. He remains in the entrance of the first zone.
Daily Routine: Fithragaer spends all of his time wandering in the entrance area of Nenyond Twyll's first zone, unable or unwilling to leave.
Personality - The Sole Survivor: Fithragaer is the only member of his battlemage detachment to survive whatever befell them in Nenyond Twyll. His continued presence in the ruin's entrance suggests he is either trapped, waiting, or too affected by his experience to leave.
author: Bethesda
